SEARCH
Package org.apache.arrow.datafusion.config

Class ParquetOptions.Builder

java.lang.Object
org.apache.arrow.datafusion.config.ParquetOptions.Builder
Enclosing class:
ParquetOptions
public static final class ParquetOptions.Builder extends Object
Builder for ParquetOptions.

    Maximum length of column index values in bytes.

    Compression codec (e.g., "snappy", "gzip", "zstd(3)").

    Creator string written into the parquet metadata.

    Maximum number of rows per data page.

    Whether to use the page index when reading parquet files.
    ParquetOptions.Builder

    Encoding (e.g., "plain", "rle", "delta_binary_packed").

    forceFilterSelections(boolean value)
    Whether to force filter selectivity estimation.
    ParquetOptions.Builder
    maximumBufferedRecordBatchesPerStream(int value)
    Maximum number of buffered record batches per stream.
    ParquetOptions.Builder
    maximumParallelRowGroupWriters(int value)
    Maximum number of parallel row group writers.
    ParquetOptions.Builder
    maxPredicateCacheSize(int value)
    Maximum number of entries in the predicate cache.
    ParquetOptions.Builder
    maxRowGroupSize(int value)
    Maximum number of rows in a row group.
    ParquetOptions.Builder
    metadataSizeHint(int value)
    Hint for the size of the parquet metadata in bytes.
    ParquetOptions.Builder
    pruning(boolean value)
    Whether to use row group pruning when reading parquet files.
    ParquetOptions.Builder
    pushdownFilters(boolean value)
    Whether to push filters down to the parquet scan.
    ParquetOptions.Builder
    reorderFilters(boolean value)
    Whether to reorder filters for efficiency.
    ParquetOptions.Builder
    schemaForceViewTypes(boolean value)
    Whether to use view types for string/binary columns in the schema.
    ParquetOptions.Builder
    skipArrowMetadata(boolean value)
    Whether to skip writing Arrow metadata to the parquet file.
    ParquetOptions.Builder
    skipMetadata(boolean value)
    Whether to skip reading parquet file metadata from the footer.
    ParquetOptions.Builder
    statisticsEnabled(String value)
    Statistics level (e.g., "none", "chunk", "page").
    ParquetOptions.Builder
    statisticsTruncateLength(int value)
    Maximum length of statistics values in bytes.
    ParquetOptions.Builder
    writeBatchSize(int value)
    Number of rows to write per batch.
    ParquetOptions.Builder
    writerVersion(String value)
    Parquet writer version (e.g., "1.0", "2.0").

  • Method Details

    • enablePageIndex

      public ParquetOptions.Builder enablePageIndex(boolean value)
      Whether to use the page index when reading parquet files.

    • pruning

      public ParquetOptions.Builder pruning(boolean value)
      Whether to use row group pruning when reading parquet files.

    • skipMetadata

      public ParquetOptions.Builder skipMetadata(boolean value)
      Whether to skip reading parquet file metadata from the footer.

    • metadataSizeHint

      public ParquetOptions.Builder metadataSizeHint(int value)
      Hint for the size of the parquet metadata in bytes.

    • pushdownFilters

      public ParquetOptions.Builder pushdownFilters(boolean value)
      Whether to push filters down to the parquet scan.

    • reorderFilters

      public ParquetOptions.Builder reorderFilters(boolean value)
      Whether to reorder filters for efficiency.

    • forceFilterSelections

      public ParquetOptions.Builder forceFilterSelections(boolean value)
      Whether to force filter selectivity estimation.

    • schemaForceViewTypes

      public ParquetOptions.Builder schemaForceViewTypes(boolean value)
      Whether to use view types for string/binary columns in the schema.

    • binaryAsString

      public ParquetOptions.Builder binaryAsString(boolean value)
      Whether to read binary columns as strings.

    • coerceInt96

      public ParquetOptions.Builder coerceInt96(String value)
      How to coerce Int96 timestamps (e.g., "timestamp_micros").

    • bloomFilterOnRead

      public ParquetOptions.Builder bloomFilterOnRead(boolean value)
      Whether to use bloom filters when reading parquet files.

    • maxPredicateCacheSize

      public ParquetOptions.Builder maxPredicateCacheSize(int value)
      Maximum number of entries in the predicate cache.

    • dataPagesizeLimit

      public ParquetOptions.Builder dataPagesizeLimit(long value)
      Maximum size of a data page in bytes.

    • writeBatchSize

      public ParquetOptions.Builder writeBatchSize(int value)
      Number of rows to write per batch.

    • writerVersion

      public ParquetOptions.Builder writerVersion(String value)
      Parquet writer version (e.g., "1.0", "2.0").

    • skipArrowMetadata

      public ParquetOptions.Builder skipArrowMetadata(boolean value)
      Whether to skip writing Arrow metadata to the parquet file.

    • compression

      public ParquetOptions.Builder compression(String value)
      Compression codec (e.g., "snappy", "gzip", "zstd(3)").

    • dictionaryEnabled

      public ParquetOptions.Builder dictionaryEnabled(boolean value)
      Whether to use dictionary encoding.

    • dictionaryPageSizeLimit

      public ParquetOptions.Builder dictionaryPageSizeLimit(long value)
      Maximum size of a dictionary page in bytes.

    • statisticsEnabled

      public ParquetOptions.Builder statisticsEnabled(String value)
      Statistics level (e.g., "none", "chunk", "page").

    • maxRowGroupSize

      public ParquetOptions.Builder maxRowGroupSize(int value)
      Maximum number of rows in a row group.

    • createdBy

      public ParquetOptions.Builder createdBy(String value)
      Creator string written into the parquet metadata.

    • columnIndexTruncateLength

      public ParquetOptions.Builder columnIndexTruncateLength(int value)
      Maximum length of column index values in bytes.

      public ParquetOptions.Builder statisticsTruncateLength(int value)
      Maximum length of statistics values in bytes.

      public ParquetOptions.Builder dataPageRowCountLimit(int value)
      Maximum number of rows per data page.

    • encoding

      public ParquetOptions.Builder encoding(String value)
      Encoding (e.g., "plain", "rle", "delta_binary_packed").

    • bloomFilterOnWrite

      public ParquetOptions.Builder bloomFilterOnWrite(boolean value)
      Whether to write bloom filters.

      False positive probability for bloom filters.

      Number of distinct values for bloom filter sizing.

      public ParquetOptions.Builder allowSingleFileParallelism(boolean value)
      Whether to allow parallelism within a single file.

      public ParquetOptions.Builder maximumParallelRowGroupWriters(int value)
